items.title: Satechi’s latest 7-in-1 OntheGo Magnetic USB-C hub for iPhone, MacBooks, more hits lowest price for Amazon Big Spring sale
items.summary:
As part of the ongoing Amazon Big Spring Sale, Satechi’s official Amazon storefront is offering its latest 7-in-1 OntheGo Magnetic USB-C hub for $41.99 shipped. This is one of the newer models the brand rolled out toward the end of last year, and it has largely been holding steady at its full $60 price without seeing any notable discounts until now. Today’s deal knocks 30% off, delivering a straight $18 markdown as part of the ongoing sale. It’s a versatile hub that works across a wide range of devices, unlike many alternatives, and you can find more details on it below, along with deals on other Satechi hubs.

more…

items.title: Acer’s Chromebook Plus Spin 714 touchscreen 2-in-1 with Google AI is down to its lowest price at $270 off
items.summary:
While Best Buy isn’t running a competing sale event like Amazon’s Big Spring Sale right now, the retailer has still been rolling out some notable discounts over the last few days. Today, it’s offering Acer’s Chromebook Plus Spin 714 touchscreen 2-in-1 for $529 shipped. This model originally carried a $699 price tag and has more recently been selling for around $799, so you’re looking at a solid $270 discount from its usual going rate. This offer brings it back down to the lowest price it briefly hit last month for the first time, when it dipped to $529 for just a day as part of the retailer’s Deals of the Day offers. It’s back to that all-time low once again today, making this a great time to cash in and snag one if you’re looking to buy a reliable everyday laptop.

From that new MacBook and pair of AirPods you’re after, through to e-bikes and power stations, smartphone accessories and chargers, and everything in between, the deals are now flying. You’ll also find apparel and outdoor yard pickups on sale and everything will be collected for you in this roundup. We will be updating this post with more of the best discounts as they happen throughout the day.

items.title: Aiper pool cleaners and smart devices are getting up to 31% spring discounts ahead of swim season starting from $130
items.summary:
During the weeklong Amazon Big Spring Sale, you can prep for upcoming pool weather with up to 31% discounts on Aiper pool cleaners and smart devices. A solid option among the less advanced and more budget-friendly models is Aiper’s 2026 upgraded Seagull SE Cordless Robotic Pool Cleaner for above-ground pools at $149.99 shipped in the white colorway, while the grey/green colorway model is sitting higher at $159.99 shipped, after clipping the on-page coupon. Normally going for $200 at full price here, this particular model has been spending most of the time since February between $160 and $170. The deal here gives you up to 25% savings that cut either $40 or $50 off the going rate, giving you a nice, wallet-friendly means to keep your above-ground pool’s floor clear of debris, with my own brother having been using one for nearly two years now. Head below to check out all the Aiper deals we’ve collected for you in one place.

more…

items.title: Columbia deals hit up to 75% off in Amazon Big Spring Sale
items.summary:
If you’re digging through the Amazon Big Spring Sale, don’t skip past the deals on Columbia right now. The brand is dropping some great discounts across a wide range of everyday and outdoor-ready gear.

We’re talking everything from those go-to full-zip fleeces and lightweight jackets to rain shells, hiking layers, and more—all built with that classic Columbia mix of durability and comfort. Whether you need something for early morning commutes, spring hikes, or just a reliable extra layer to throw on, there’s a lot here that fits the bill.

items.title: Score up to 37% Amazon spring savings on EGO Power+ cordless electric tools, batteries, more starting from $90
items.summary:
During Amazon’s weeklong Big Spring Sale event, you can find a nice selection of EGO Power+ tools benefiting from up to 37% discounts, like one of my favorites (and the only model from the series included in this sale), the 56V Cordless Electric Multi-Head Combo Kit that gives you a 15-inch String Trimmer attachment with the Power Head and a 5.0Ah battery at $339 shipped. Down from its $390 full price, we’ve been seeing it hold out at this reduced rate since the start of March. This $51 markdown is continuing through the rest of the month during this sale event, so you can bring it home at its fourth-lowest tracked price, as well as the best rate we’ve seen since mid-December. We’ve also put together a roundup of all the other Big Spring EGO Power+ tool deals below – all starting from $90.

items.title: Amazon undercuts EcoFlow sale on these power stations with up to 53% spring savings – deals start from $147
items.summary:
As part of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, we’re seeing a number of EcoFlow power stations getting up to 53% discounts over their parallel direct Spring Sale pricing, like the 768Wh RIVER 2 Pro Portable Power Station down at $314.99 shipped, beating out the brand’s direct website pricing by $24. While it may be listed directly with a $599 MSRP, over at Amazon the price only climbs as high as $529, with discounts over the past year having mostly kept costs above $339, though we have seen it drop down to this same rate twice since December. Now, you’re getting another chance at a 40% markdown that cuts $214 off the going rate ($284 off the MSRP) for the second-lowest price we have tracked – just $16 above the one-time low we spotted during Black Friday. Head below to learn more about this popular compact power solution and browse the other units seeing better discounts at Amazon. For many of the brand’s larger models, be sure to check out our coverage of EcoFlow’s ongoing direct Spring Sale.
